commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer label, credential-scoping concern, and missing real behavior proof make this a human review and author-update path rather than an automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff can expose unrelated persisted auth credentials to all non-PI agent harness attempts.; Review finding: [P2] Limit the harness auth store to the forwarded profile — src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts:1213 (sha=45a183123d8a434722b252a7e890fe2d5d150b8a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR loads the persisted auth profile store for plugin-owned harness attempts, passes that store into run attempts, adds OpenAI/Codex auth metadata regression assertions, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established here. Source inspection shows current main passes an empty authProfileStore to plugin-owned harness attempts while the Codex app-server uses that store to resolve native auth metadata, and the linked beta report provides the observed OAuth-only failure context.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer label, credential-scoping concern, and missing real behavior proof make this a human review and author-update path rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: Keep migrated OpenAI Codex OAuth runs on native Codex auth
target.author: pashpashpash
